title: vestalihy
description:
Vestalihy – a mod that adds tank sights for Create Big Cannons, Create Aeronautics, and Sable, with support for sight tilt adjustment via pitch.   
Also includes an Anti-Tank Guided Missile (ATGM).
The mod has support for the Synax
body:
Eng:

- Vestalihy – a mod that adds tank sights for Create Big Cannons, Create Aeronautics, and Sable, with support for sight tilt adjustment via pitch.
    
- Also includes an Anti-Tank Guided Missile (ATGM).
    
- The mod has support for the Synaxis mod, specifically the "Control_chair" seed.


Ru:

- Vestalihy - мод добавляющий танковые прицелы для Create Big Cannons, Сreate Aeronautics и Sable с поддержкой наклона прицела по тангажу/pitch
    
- Так же Противотанковая Управляемая Ракета(ПТУР)
    
- Мод имеет поддержку мода Synaxis, а именно сидушки Control_chair.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
![Vestalis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86b6243fb8e1761e0a5e3ea0b87e9c0b694094ea_0.webp)
